title: MCA Reborn x Easy Villagers Compat
description: MCA x EV Compat is a compatibility addon created to improve integration between Easy Villagers and MCA Reborn.
body:
# MCA Reborn x Easy Villagers Compat

**MCA Reborn x Easy Villagers Compat** is an unofficial compatibility addon for **Minecraft Comes Alive Reborn** and **Easy Villagers**.

It allows MCA Reborn villagers to work with Easy Villagers while preserving their identity, appearance, profession, family data and relationships.

## Short Description

Makes Easy Villagers work with MCA Reborn villagers while preserving MCA identity, appearance, profession, family data and relationships.

## Features

- Pick up MCA Reborn villagers using Easy Villagers.
- Restore the original MCA villager instead of converting it into a vanilla villager.
- Preserve MCA data such as appearance, name, gender, personality, genetics, family, relationships and profession.
- Prevent villager duplication during pickup and restoration.
- Show the real MCA villager name on stored villager items.
- Render MCA villagers in the inventory, hotbar, GUI and supported Easy Villagers blocks.
- Supports Trader, Breeder, Farmer, Converter, Incubator and Iron Farm blocks.
- Generate MCA babies in the Breeder when both parents are MCA villagers.
- Preserve MCA babies in the Incubator and advance their MCA age data safely.
- Run a safe MCA Converter path that correctly applies the cure reputation result.
- Prevent MCA villagers from opening the vanilla merchant screen when picked up.
- Configure stored MCA villager sounds to use MCA voices, Easy Villagers default sounds or muted sounds.
- Configure sound behavior by action, including pickup, inventory, block insertion, block removal and block processing.
- Configure sound behavior by block, including Trader, Breeder, Farmer, Iron Farm, Converter and Incubator.
- Use simplified common and client configs.
- Keep compatibility, rendering and debug options available for troubleshooting and modpack use.

## Dependencies

Required:

- Minecraft Comes Alive Reborn for Forge 1.20.1
- Easy Villagers for Forge 1.20.1

## Notes

This mod does not include or redistribute Minecraft Comes Alive Reborn or Easy Villagers. Both mods are required separately.

This is an unofficial compatibility addon.

Back up your world before installing or updating mods, especially if you already have villagers stored inside Easy Villagers blocks.

## Feedback and Suggestions

If you have any questions, issues or run into any problems, please feel free to leave your feedback.

Ideas for new mods, improvements or future features are always welcome.
